Operation 'putStoresByStoreentityid' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague about what fields can be updated and what is returned. Added clarity on input requirements (storeEntityId parameter), supported fields, return value, and partial update capability for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Updates store details for the specified entity ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Update store details by entity ID
data.description_suggestion: Updates store details for the specified store entity ID. Accepts store configuration changes such as name, location, and other store attributes. Returns the updated store object. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified. Requires the storeEntityId path parameter.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what fields can be updated and what is returned. Added clarity on input requirements (storeEntityId parameter), supported fields, return value, and partial update capability for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteStoresByStoreentityid' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about the required parameter and the important constraint about stores with assigned staff. Added explicit mention of the storeEntityId requirement and the deletion constraint to help AI agents understand when this operation can succeed.

data.current_description: Deletes a store from the system.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a store from the system using the specified store entity ID. Requires the storeEntityId path parameter. Note: Stores with assigned staff cannot be deleted and will return an error. This operation permanently removes the store record.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about the required parameter and the important constraint about stores with assigned staff. Added explicit mention of the storeEntityId requirement and the deletion constraint to help AI agents understand when this operation can succeed.

message: Operation 'postDesignations' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks details about what input is expected, what is returned, and authorization context. Added information about request body expectations, return value, and role-based access control to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Creates a new designation/role in the system.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new designation/role in the system. Accepts designation configuration details in the request body. Returns the newly created designation object with assigned identifier. Only users with appropriate roles (admin, companyAdmin, areaManager, storeManager, etc.) can create designations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks details about what input is expected, what is returned, and authorization context. Added information about request body expectations, return value, and role-based access control to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'deleteDesignationsByDesignation' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate. Description lacks clarity about the required path parameter and potential side effects. Added explicit mention of the designation parameter requirement and guidance about checking for assigned users to help AI agents understand prerequisites and consequences.

data.current_description: Deletes a designation/role from the system.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a designation/role from the system using the specified designation identifier. Requires the designation path parameter. This operation permanently removes the designation record. Verify that no users are assigned to this designation before deletion.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks clarity about the required path parameter and potential side effects. Added explicit mention of the designation parameter requirement and guidance about checking for assigned users to help AI agents understand prerequisites and consequences.

message: Operation 'postTickets' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks information about expected inputs and outputs. Added details about supported priority values, request body expectations, return value, and domain context about ticket purpose to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Creates a new ticket in the system.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new ticket in the system. Accepts ticket details including title, description, priority (highest, high, medium, low, lowest), and other ticket attributes in the request body. Returns the newly created ticket object with assigned ticket ID and metadata. Tickets are used for tracking issues and tasks.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks information about expected inputs and outputs. Added details about supported priority values, request body expectations, return value, and domain context about ticket purpose to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getTicketsAuto' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Description is too vague about what configuration data is returned. Added context about what the configuration controls (automatic ticket creation rules and triggers) and clarified that it returns configuration settings to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and output.

data.current_description: Retrieves the automatic ticket generation configuration.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the automatic ticket generation configuration for the company. Returns configuration settings that define how tickets are automatically created and processed. This includes rules, triggers, and parameters that govern automatic ticket creation behavior.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about what configuration data is returned. Added context about what the configuration controls (automatic ticket creation rules and triggers) and clarified that it returns configuration settings to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and output.

data.current_description:
Retrieves user information for the company.

Query behavior:
- If `userEmail` is provided, returns the matching user.
- If `employeeId` is provided, returns the matching user.
- If both are provided, `userEmail` is used.
- If neither is provided, returns all users.

Response notes:
- The `data` field is always an array.
- For single-user queries, the array contains one user object.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve user by email, employee ID, or list all users
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves user information from the company. Supports flexible querying: provide `userEmail` to retrieve a specific user, `employeeId` to retrieve by employee ID, or neither parameter to retrieve all users. If both parameters are provided, `userEmail` takes precedence. Returns a User array in the `data` field - for single-user queries, the array contains one user object; for all-users queries, the array contains all company users.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get user information' is too generic and doesn't convey the flexible query behavior. Enhanced summary indicates the multiple query modes. Description is well-structured but could be more concise and clearer about the response format for AI agent interpretation.
